name: Measurement Enforcement Test
description: Minimal blueprint to verify measurement coverage enforcement. Agent writes a short summary and measures its own output against 3 mission invariants.

invariants.condition: Produce a 2-3 sentence summary about how software systems use invariants for quality assurance.
invariants.assessment: Verify the output contains a coherent 2-3 sentence summary about invariants in software quality.

measurement.hint: Measure whether the summary was produced and is on-topic.

invariants.condition: Output at least 30 words in the summary.
invariants.assessment: Count the words in the summary output. Must be >= 30.

measurement.hint: Count words in your output and measure against min_threshold of 30.

invariants.condition: Output is plain text without markdown headers or code blocks.
invariants.assessment: Verify the output contains no markdown headers (##) or fenced code blocks (```).

measurement.hint: Check that output has no markdown formatting.

context: Write a short plain-text summary (2-3 sentences, at least 30 words) about how software systems use invariants for quality assurance. Then measure each invariant using create_measurement.
